_README: Copy to secrets.local.json and fill. NEVER commit the filled file — it is gitignored. Real values are transferred out-of-band, never in the repo, never in a ticket. Keys starting with _ are comments and are not rendered.
_HOW_TO_OBTAIN: One line per key, below. Never paste a real value here, not even a temporary one.
_PLATFORM_A_TOKEN: how to obtain: platform A developer console -> app -> generate token
PLATFORM_A_TOKEN: TO_PROVIDE - client generates it, scoping call
_PLATFORM_B_TOKEN: how to obtain: platform B business settings -> integrations -> API token
PLATFORM_B_TOKEN: TO_PROVIDE - client generates it, scoping call
_ALERT_WEBHOOK: how to obtain: your ops chat -> integrations -> incoming webhook. NOTE: alerts sent here LEAVE the machine.
